{"code":"
incidents = pagerduty.list_incidents(urgency="high", status="triggered")
ids = [i['id'] for i in incidents]
body = "\n".join(ids)

    to="oncall@acme.io",
    subject="Triage",
    body=body
)
print(result)
print("count:", len(ids))
